## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Experiment or research artifact

## Checklist

- [ ] I removed API keys, private data, local logs, and model weights.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran relevant tests or explained why tests were not run.
- [ ] I kept the change focused enough to review.

## Testing

Describe the checks you ran.
